# Marginfy — Profitability Intelligence for Growing Businesses

## What is Marginfy?

Marginfy is a Fractional CFO services and profitability intelligence company based in Melbourne, Victoria, Australia. Marginfy was founded to give founder-led businesses access to CFO-level strategic finance expertise without the cost of a full-time Chief Financial Officer.

Marginfy combines fractional CFO advisory services, pricing and profitability consulting, financial modelling, finance transformation advisory, and a proprietary profitability intelligence software platform.

The primary brand positioning is: Profitability Intelligence for Growing Businesses.

Primary tagline: "Find your profit leaks. Optimise pricing. Scale with confidence."

Website: https://www.marginfy.com
Email: admin@marginfy.com
Location: Melbourne, VIC, Australia
Service area: Australia-wide

---

## Founder

Name: Clemency Mdaya
Title: Founder & Fractional CFO
Location: Melbourne, Australia

Clemency Mdaya is a senior finance executive with 15+ years of experience in commercial finance, financial control, pricing strategy, profitability analysis, forecasting and strategic finance.

Most recent position: Division Manager – Finance (Financial Controller), Australian Grand Prix Corporation.

Key credentials:
- Managed finance across $200M+ annual revenue operations
- Board, CFO and executive-level financial reporting
- Audit, governance and compliance leadership
- Pricing and profitability modelling expertise
- Treasury and cash flow management
- ERP implementation (Sage Intacct)
- Forecasting systems implementation (Martus)
- Cross-sector experience: hospitality, eCommerce, events, NDIS, charities, founder-led businesses

---

## Services

### 1. Fractional CFO Services
Ongoing strategic finance support on a monthly retainer.

Scope includes:
- Monthly management reporting
- Forecasting and budgeting
- Cash flow management
- Board reporting
- Strategic finance advice
- KPI dashboard design

Pricing:
- Starter: AUD $1,500–$2,500 per month
- Growth: AUD $3,000–$5,000 per month
- Strategic: AUD $6,000+ per month

URL: https://www.marginfy.com/fractional-cfo

### 2. Pricing & Profitability Reviews
Commercial analysis of pricing, product profitability and unit economics.

Scope includes:
- Pricing strategy review
- Product and channel profitability analysis
- Contribution margin modelling
- Margin optimisation recommendations
- Scenario modelling

Pricing: AUD $3,500–$10,000+ (fixed-price project)

URL: https://www.marginfy.com/pricing-profitability

### 3. Financial Modelling
Dynamic financial models for strategic decision-making.

Model types:
- Three-way financial models (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)
- Pricing models
- Forecasting and scenario analysis
- Investment and business cases

Pricing: AUD $2,500–$7,500+ (fixed-price project)

URL: https://www.marginfy.com/financial-modelling

### 4. Finance Function Advisory
Finance transformation and operational improvement.

Scope includes:
- ERP and systems implementation (Sage Intacct, Xero, MYOB)
- Finance process redesign
- Controls and governance frameworks
- Reporting and dashboard enhancement

Pricing: Project-based

URL: https://www.marginfy.com/finance-function-advisory

Standard advisory rate: AUD $200 per hour
Minimum engagement fee: AUD $2,500

---

## Software Product

Marginfy Software is a profitability intelligence platform currently in development.

Capabilities (planned):
- Product profitability analysis
- Customer profitability analysis and scoring
- Margin diagnostics
- Pricing optimisation and scenario modelling
- AI-generated financial insights
- Forecasting
- Dashboard reporting

Tagline: "Your CFO in your pocket."

URL: https://www.marginfy.com/software

---

## Industries Served

- Hospitality (restaurants, cafes, bars, accommodation)
- eCommerce (online retail, DTC brands, marketplaces)
- NDIS providers (registered and unregistered)
- Events and entertainment businesses
- Professional services firms
- Startups preparing to scale
- Charities and community organisations
- Consumer products businesses

---

## Target Client Profile

Primary target: Founder-led businesses with AUD $1M–$50M in annual revenue.

Typical client pain points:
- Revenue is growing but profits are not
- Pricing is based on intuition rather than analysis
- Cash flow is unpredictable
- No visibility into profitability by product, customer or channel
- Financial reporting is backward-looking and not actionable
- No strategic finance partner

---

## Key Differentiators

1. Hybrid advisory + software model — combining immediate advisory value with scalable software
2. Sector-specific expertise across hospitality, eCommerce, NDIS and events
3. Executive-level credentials (Australian Grand Prix Corporation, $200M+ revenue management)
4. Commercial focus — not just accounting, but genuine commercial financial intelligence
5. Founder-friendly approach — working alongside founders, not above them
6. Australia-based and Australia-wide delivery

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is a Fractional CFO?
A: A Fractional CFO is an experienced Chief Financial Officer who works on a part-time or retained basis. Businesses receive CFO-level strategy, reporting and commercial advice without the cost of a full-time executive hire.

Q: How much does a Fractional CFO cost?
A: Marginfy's Fractional CFO retainers start from AUD $1,500 per month. The Growth tier is AUD $3,000–$5,000/month. The Strategic tier is AUD $6,000+ per month.

Q: Does Marginfy work with businesses outside Melbourne?
A: Yes. Marginfy delivers services Australia-wide via remote engagement.

Q: What industries does Marginfy specialise in?
A: Hospitality, eCommerce, NDIS, events and entertainment, professional services and founder-led businesses across other sectors.

Q: How is a Fractional CFO different from an accountant?
A: An accountant primarily handles compliance (tax, BAS, financial statements). A Fractional CFO works forward-looking: forecasting, profitability analysis, pricing strategy, cash flow management and commercial decision support.
